bullets: Helped establish and scale a new engineering team responsible for rebuilding the company's core digital platforms.
Rebuilt booking, membership, loyalty, and operational management systems using React and Next.js.
Integrated OnePay, TPBank, and OCB payment gateways for online bookings, subscriptions, and membership purchases.
Implemented Amplitude, GA4, and GTM for analytics, attribution, and marketing campaign tracking.
Partnered with Product, Design, Marketing, QA, and Backend teams to improve customer experience and conversion.
Built AI-enabled SaaS products CQ and Capitalis using React, Next.js, Node.js, and Tailwind CSS.
Worked across requirement clarification, UI implementation, API integration, testing, and delivery with Product, Design, and Backend.
Built prototypes and MVPs to validate business requirements and investor feedback.
Contributed to backend features, API integrations, and Stripe payment workflows.
Adopted AI-assisted engineering workflows to improve delivery efficiency.
Built and maintained customer-facing sportsbook and sports prediction-market experiences across web and mobile platforms using Vue, Nuxt, and React Native.
Worked on core product flows including registration, user profile, betting flow, wager status, bet matching status, deposits, and withdrawals.
Implemented real-time wager and bet status updates using Pusher to support live betting and matching workflows.
Integrated PayPal, Trustly, WorldPay, and PayNearMe payment providers while maintaining deposit and withdrawal experiences.
Delivered Martech and analytics integrations with Segment, AppsFlyer, Mixpanel, Braze, and Customer.io to support attribution, lifecycle marketing, and customer engagement.
Built React, Vue, Next.js, and React Native products; designed SQL databases and .NET Core APIs; managed Google Play and App Store deployments.
Developed enterprise applications with Gatsby, GraphQL, Contentful, and Angular; supported Azure integrations, architecture, and code reviews.
Built and maintained cloud enterprise applications using AngularJS, SharePoint, Office365, and Microsoft Graph.
